news.title: Nanobiotix Shares Set a New Record at €41.52, Up 1,202% Over the Year
news.summary: FDA accepted a protocol amendment for Nanobiotix's pivotal Phase 3 NANORAY-312 head and neck cancer study, eliminating interim analysis and accelerating final readout. The stock surged to record highs with strong analyst support and a massive 1,202% yearly gain.
